channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: DJI Sues Insta360 Over Luna Ultra Similarities
item.description: DJI has filed lawsuits against Insta360, claiming patent violations related to the new Luna Ultra camera, which resembles the Osmo Pocket 4P. The lawsuits are filed in the US.

item.title: iOS 27 Introduces New Keyboards and Typing Features
item.description: iOS 27 adds support for new keyboards, including Afrikaans and Indigenous languages, enhancing typing experiences across multiple languages. Apple continues to expand its accessibility features.

item.title: macOS Golden Gate Phasing Out Rosetta 2 Support
item.description: Apple will discontinue Rosetta 2 support in macOS Golden Gate, affecting Intel-based apps on Apple silicon Macs. Users need to prepare for app compatibility issues.

item.title: Over 400 Arch Linux AUR Packages Hijacked
item.description: More than 400 Arch Linux AUR packages were hijacked to deploy a Rust credential stealer and optional eBPF rootkit. Users are urged to check their systems for vulnerabilities.

item.title: Jurassic World Rebirth 2 Update from Writer
item.description: Screenwriter David Koepp provides an update on the sequel to Jurassic World Rebirth, confirming that development is underway. Fans eagerly await more details.

item.title: Resident Evil Veronica Remake Story Adjustments
item.description: Capcom is modifying Code: Veronica's story for its remake to better fit the evolving Resident Evil series. This aims to enhance narrative cohesion.

item.title: iOS 27 Features Revealed at Apple Keynote
item.description: Apple's keynote unveiled numerous features for iOS 27, including enhancements across various platforms. The full list highlights significant updates.

item.title: Pokémon Go Scans Used for Military AI Tool
item.description: 30 billion Pokémon Go images are now training an AI model for US military drone navigation, showcasing innovative uses of gaming data in defense technology.

item.title: Ubuntu 26.10 to Switch to Dbus-Broker
item.description: Ubuntu 26.10 plans to switch its default D-Bus implementation to the high-performance Dbus-Broker, enhancing system performance and efficiency.

item.title: Guild Wars 3 Timeline Revealed
item.description: ArenaNet has clarified the timeline for Guild Wars 3, but it appears there won't be a traditional guild war. Fans are curious about the new direction.

item.title: Fold 8 vs. Fold 8 Ultra Images Leaked
item.description: Leaked images of the Fold 8 and Fold 8 Ultra reveal discrepancies in previous expectations. Fans are eager for official confirmations.

item.title: Stranger Than Heaven Explores Tupac's Potential Future
item.description: The game Stranger Than Heaven will envision Tupac Shakur's life had he lived today, according to RGG Studio head Masayoshi Yokoyama. This unique concept aims to engage fans.

item.title: Zelda: Ocarina Of Time Remake Exclusive to Switch 2
item.description: The upcoming Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time Remake will be exclusive to the Nintendo Switch 2, limiting access for many fans. Anticipation builds for its release.

item.title: Final Fantasy VII Revelation Level Cap Increased
item.description: Final Fantasy VII Revelation will allow players to reach level 99, featuring a massive endgame and challenging Weapons bosses. Fans are excited about the new content.

item.title: MacBook Neo Review: A Solid Alternative
item.description: The MacBook Neo performed well during a week of testing, proving to be a reliable alternative to the MacBook Pro. Users may find it a suitable option.
